card.name: Warden of the Nithir-Sìth
card.text: Phaselock (Creatures phase out as this deals damage to them. Phaselocked creatures don't phase in at untap unless their controller skips that turn's draw step.)

card.name: Maiden of Crashing Tide
card.text: (This card is blue. Spend a different color of mana on each {V}.) Drop — When this creature enters, untap each creature you control. They gain haste until end of turn. Then if you didn't cast any creature spells during your last turn, tap each creature you don't control.
